## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. "Closes #123"). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component / feature
- [ ] Documentation / generated artifacts
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm ready` passes locally (regen → check → build → type check → tests)
- [ ] Regenerated artifacts are committed (run `pnpm regen` if you changed manifests/registry)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Components follow the authoring rules in `CLAUDE.md` (signals not hooks, modern CSS, WCAG 2.2 AA, i18n)
